scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:database && bun run build:domain && bun run build:web && bun run build:api
scripts.type-check: bun run --cwd packages/shared type-check && bun run --cwd packages/database type-check && bun run --cwd packages/domain type-check && bun run --cwd apps/api type-check && bun run --cwd apps/web type-check
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/web lint && bun run --cwd apps/api lint
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/dist
